epic.title: EVA ADO Dashboard
epic.description: EVA Portal home page (23+ product tile grid, live ADO sprint badges) and ADO embedded sprint views (/devops/sprint) delivered as React components into 31-eva-faces. Data sourced from ADO REST via ev-brain APIM route /v1/scrum/dashboard. No ADO login required for viewers. Spec author repo — 31-eva-faces is the implementer.

features.title: Reference Components & Type Contract
features.description: scrum.ts canonical types, scrumApi.ts APIM client, reference EVAHomePage and SprintBoardPage. Epic YAML interface contract for 31-eva-faces. GC Design System + bilingual.

features.title: APIM Data Route (/v1/scrum/dashboard)
features.description: eva-brain endpoint GET /v1/scrum/dashboard calling ADO REST, shaping response, caching to Cosmos (TTL 24h). APIM registers route. Daily refresh via Logic App or scheduled Function.

features.title: Thread Graph and Operations Views
features.description: Dashboard projections for thread graph, ready queue, critical path, blocked lanes, retries, and execution health. Read-only operator surface over 33 and 40 projections.

user_stories.title: [DASH-WI-0] eva-brain /v1/scrum/dashboard endpoint — ADO REST + Cosmos cache
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: GET /v1/scrum/dashboard returns features, sprints, WIs, metrics. Response schema matches ScrumDashboardResponse type. Cosmos scrum-cache container stores response with 24h TTL.

evidence.notes: Depends on WI-7 (eva-brain deployed) and APIM import (Mar 29-30 2026).

user_stories.title: [DASH-WI-1] APIM route /v1/scrum/dashboard registered in marco-sandbox-apim
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Route registered in marco-sandbox-apim. Auth: subscription key + AAD token. Rate limiting configured. APIM calls eva-brain /v1/scrum/dashboard. Browser can call APIM without ADO credentials.

user_stories.title: [DASH-WI-2] Reference components — EVAHomePage, SprintBoardPage, ProductTile, SprintBadge
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: All reference components in src/components/ and src/pages/. Types in scrum.ts. API client in scrumApi.ts. Epic YAML updated in 31-eva-faces. Mock data fallback when VITE_APIM_BASE_URL empty. WCAG 2.1 AA.

evidence.notes: Depends on DASH-WI-1 for live data. Static/mock version can proceed independently.

user_stories.title: [DASH-WI-3] Thread graph board — lanes, dependencies, and critical path
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Dashboard renders a thread graph view showing dependent and independent lanes, edge relationships, and critical-path highlighting sourced from thread projection endpoints.

evidence.notes: Primary visual projection for the approved control-plane thread model.

user_stories.title: [DASH-WI-4] Ready queue and blocked lane views — operator projection
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows ready queue, blocked lanes, blocker cause, and gate status without exposing raw runtime internals. Operators can see what can run now and what is stalled.

user_stories.title: [DASH-WI-5] Execution health summary — retries, evidence freshness, lane throughput
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Dashboard summarizes runtime health by lane, retry count, evidence freshness, and throughput. Summary is sourced from 40-eva-control-plane aggregates and exposed via stable UI contracts.

evidence.notes: Keeps 39 as a projection surface rather than an orchestration engine.
